commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

generation.compiledCode: var C=Object.defineProperty;var d=(t,n)=>C(t,"name",{value:n,configurable:!0});import{jsx as o,jsxs as f}from"react/jsx-runtime";const I={sunny:"\u2600\uFE0F",clear:"\u2600\uFE0F",cloudy:"\u2601\uFE0F","partly cloudy":"\u26C5",rainy:"\u{1F327}\uFE0F",showers:"\u{1F326}\uFE0F",thunderstorm:"\u26C8\uFE0F",snowy:"\u2744\uFE0F",windy:"\u{1F4A8}",foggy:"\u{1F32B}\uFE0F",mist:"\u{1F32B}\uFE0F"},W="\u{1F321}\uFE0F",S={C:"\xB0C",F:"\xB0F"},E={HUMIDITY:"Humidity",WIND_SPEED:"Wind Speed"},L="C";function T(t){const{temperature:n,unit:e,condition:r,humidity:i,windSpeed:a,forecast:s}=t;return useMemo(()=>{const c={sunny:"\u2600\uFE0F",cloudy:"\u2601\uFE0F",rainy:"\u{1F327}\uFE0F",snowy:"\u2744\uFE0F",thunderstorm:"\u26C8\uFE0F",partlyCloudy:"\u26C5"},u=`${Math.round(n)}\xB0`,p=e==="F"?"\xB0F":"\xB0C",y=c[r.toLowerCase()]||"\u26C5",h=`${i}%`,m=`${a} ${e==="F"?"mph":"km/h"}`;return{formattedTemp:u,unitLabel:p,conditionIcon:y,humidityDisplay:h,windDisplay:m,forecastData:s}},[n,e,r,i,a,s])}d(T,"useWeatherCard");function l(t){const{city:n,condition:e,unitLabel:r,formattedTemp:i,conditionIcon:a,humidityDisplay:s,windDisplay:c,forecastData:u}=t;return o(Container,{maxWidth:"sm",padding:16,center:!0,children:o(Card,{shadow:"md",padding:24,children:f(Stack,{gap:24,direction:"vertical",children:[o(CurrentWeather,{city:n,temperature:i,unit:r,condition:e,icon:a}),o("div",{style:{height:"1px",background:"var(--ggui-color-neutral-200, #e5e7eb)",width:"100%"}}),o(WeatherMetrics,{humidity:s,windSpeed:c}),o(ForecastStrip,{forecast:u,unit:r})]})})})}d(l,"ComponentUI");function g(t){const n=useComponent(t);return o(l,{...t,...n})}d(g,"Component");export{g as default};

evaluation.critique: The component demonstrates solid data rendering from props and good visual hierarchy, but has inconsistent design token usage (some hardcoded fallback colors like '#52525b', '#18181b') and lacks interactive polish (no hover states, transitions, or loading indicators). The layout is responsive with proper flex/stack usage, though the ForecastStrip component appears incomplete in the provided code.
